docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGACY MEDICAL CONSULTANTS, LP, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO LEGACY MEDICAL CONSULTANTS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT RASH, WAYNE C. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGACY MEDICAL CONSULTANTS, LP, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO LEGACY MEDICAL CONSULTANTS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RASH, WAYNE C. $172,347.39 PRINCIPAL, $7,736.75 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $180,519.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79546298) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGACY MEDICAL CONSULTANTS, LP, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO LEGACY MEDICAL CONSULTANTS, LLC. SERVED MAY-20-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT RASH, WAYNE C. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JUN-22-2026 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
